title: One Dollar Too Many
writer: Augusto Finocchi, Vittorio Metz, José María Rodríguez Méndez
actors: Antonio Sabato, John Saxon, Frank Wolff
plot: Suave gambler Clay Watson, cocky sharpshooter Moses Lang, and wily thespian Edwin Kean are a trio of criminals in the Old West. The motley threesome are forced to form an uneasy alliance in order to find $400,000 dollars in stolen...
